field.name: qr_code
field.required: parent.use_existing_lots and parent.picking_code == 'incoming' and parent.division == 'Unit' and parent.has_qr_code == 'yes'
field.column_invisible: parent.has_tracking != 'serial' or parent.picking_code != 'incoming' or parent.use_create_lots or parent.division != 'Unit' or parent.has_qr_code == 'no'
